chapter_title.ar: باب مَاءِ الْحَمَّامِ وَ الْمَاءِ الَّذِي تُسَخِّنُهُ الشَّمْسُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – Water of the bathhouse, and the water which the sun warms up

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/49)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/49)
text: سَمِعْتُ رَجُلًا يَقُولُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي أَدْخُلُ الْحَمَّامَ فِي السَّحَرِ وَ فِيهِ الْجُنُبُ وَ غَيْرُ ذَلِكَ فَأَقُومُ فَأَغْتَسِلُ فَيَنْتَضِحُ عَلَيَّ بَعْدَ مَا أَفْرُغُ مِنْ مَائِهِمْ قَالَ أَ لَيْسَ هُوَ جَارٍ قُلْتُ بَلَى قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Hanan who said,

‘I heard a man saying to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I enter the bathhouse in the morning, and therein is the man with sexual impurity and other than that. So I arise and I wash, so the water from their waters sprinkles upon me after I have finished’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is it not so that it is flowing (water)?’ I said, ‘Yes’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Amir from Ali ibn Mahziyar from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from Hanan who has said the following: “I once heard a man saying to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘In the morning I enter the bathhouse and there is one who has experienced sexual relation and so on. I then stand up and take Ghusl (bath) and water from them sprinkles on me after I finish.’ He (the Imam) asked, ‘Is it not running water?’
